title: Sketchbook Booth Set Up
excerpt: Thought I would share a little video using over 250 photos taken while we set up the booth at CHA in Anaheim. Sketchbook should be hitting your local stores and online retailers soon, if it hasn't already! We've spotted a…
body:
Thought I would share a little video using over 250 photos taken while we set up the booth at CHA in Anaheim.

Sketchbook should be hitting your local stores and online retailers soon, if it hasn't already! We've spotted a lot of the collection at Simon Says Stamp.

Updated: the Sketchbook Collection is now up on Two Peas In A Bucket!

Have a wonderful weekend!

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
